provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Renew the certificate and reload nginx:
1. sudo certbot renew --nginx
2. sudo nginx -t
3. sudo systemctl reload nginx
Then verify expiry: echo | openssl s_client -connect host:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -enddate
